content.claim: The documented rise in SNI identification in Hungary (cited as 40% growth over 20 years) lacks a single reconciled public statistical series by consistent definition across years and education levels, creating a monitoring and feedback-loop gap for policymakers.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Implementation planning lens
limitations: The 40% figure originates from an industry conference source (private development-center CEO) rather than independent statistical office analysis
Divergent cited counts (104,865 vs. 69,000 vs. 92,845) lack published reconciliation showing which cover different education levels or years
No independent audit of the KSH data comparability across reporting periods was found
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
